dialogueChunks.intro: Please, {player_name}, I would not ask if we had any other choice. Since {quest_origin}, {quest_threat} have grown bold enough to strike us directly.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They hit {quest_focus} two nights ago and took nearly everything. We need someone to {quest_action} before it is too late. I have heard there are {quest_item} scattered {location_hint} that could help us restock.
dialogueChunks.outro: Without those supplies, {quest_stakes} will not survive the week. I am begging you.

playerResponses.text: I will find what you need. No one should go hungry.
What is in it for me?

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, thank the stars you are here. Ever since {quest_origin}, {quest_threat} has been claiming more of us each day.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We traced it back to {quest_focus}, but we lack the means to fix it. We desperately need someone to {quest_action}. {quest_ally} mentioned that {quest_item} can be found {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Please, {quest_stakes} cannot wait. We need this done {quest_time_pressure}.

playerResponses.text: Children are suffering. I will go now.
Fine, but I expect fair payment.

dialogueChunks.intro: Stranger, I have no pride left. {player_name}, since {quest_origin} drove them from their dens, {quest_threat} have been terrorizing {quest_focus}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We have already lost half our herd. Someone needs to {quest_action} before we lose the rest. The {enemy_type} have been sighted {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: If {quest_stakes} are taken, this settlement is finished. I will give you {quest_reward_hint} if you help us.

playerResponses.text: Point me toward them. I will handle it.
Tell me more about this blade first.
Sounds too dangerous for too little.
